about.title: Who I am
about.subtitle: // ABOUT ME
about.description: I'm a MERN stack developer who loves writing clean, efficient and maintainable code. I enjoy turning ideas into real-world products with a strong focus on functionality, performance and scalability.
points: Frontend heavy with strong backend understanding
